games.name: Cemu (Wii U Emulator)
games.label: DS4 with gyro
games.author: hifihedgehog
games.notes: Enable DSU motion server for gyro-enabled games like Zelda: Breath of the Wild and Splatoon. Use DS4 output for touchpad support.

games.name: Cemu (Wii U Emulator)
games.label: Xbox basic
games.author: hifihedgehog
games.notes: Standard Xbox 360 layout for games without motion controls.

games.name: Dolphin (Wii/GameCube Emulator)
games.label: DS4 with gyro
games.author: hifihedgehog
games.notes: Enable DSU motion server for Wii games with motion controls. Use DS4 output type.

games.name: Yuzu / Suyu (Switch Emulator)
games.label: DS4 with gyro
games.author: hifihedgehog
games.notes: Enable DSU motion server for gyro-enabled Switch titles. Use DS4 output for touchpad-as-touchscreen support.

games.name: Ryujinx (Switch Emulator)
games.label: DS4 with gyro
games.author: hifihedgehog
games.notes: Enable DSU motion server for gyro-enabled Switch titles.
